title: Opening for Hotel Manager at FabHotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at FabHotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, FabHotels in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
